import io
import string
import list

fn main() -> Unit
  let line1 = io.read_line()
  let line2 = io.read_line()
  match line1
  when None
    print("not_found")
  when Some(s1)
    match line2
    when None
      print("not_found")
    when Some(s2)
      let parts = string.split_whitespace(s1)
      mut nums: List<Int> = []
      for p in parts
        match string.parse_int(p)
        when Some(n)
          nums = list.push(nums, n)
        when None
          ()
        end
      end
      let target_str = string.trim(s2)
      match string.parse_int(target_str)
      when None
        print("not_found")
      when Some(t)
        mut lo = 0
        mut hi = nums.len()
        mut found = -1
        while lo < hi
          let mid = (lo + hi) / 2
          match nums.get(mid)
          when Some(v)
            if v == t
              found = mid
              lo = hi
            else if v < t
              lo = mid + 1
            else
              hi = mid
            end
          when None
            lo = hi
          end
        end
        if found >= 0
          print("index=#{found}")
        else
          print("not_found")
        end
      end
    end
  end
end
